history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi! How can I help you today? Just say what you'd like and I'll get it for you!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hi there! What do you recommend today for a normal-sized meal?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi there! For a normal-sized meal, I'd recommend the Butter Paneer Grilled Burger—it's a solid choice. Would you like to add any drinks or fries with that?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Got it! I'll have a small apple juice and no fries. That sounds like a good light meal for me. Thanks!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! I'll get you the Iced Tea (small) and no fries—perfect for a light meal. Is that right?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's exactly what I wanted. Thanks so much!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: You're welcome! I'll get you the McChicken and a small apple juice—just to confirm: McChicken and small apple juice? Perfect for a light meal!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's exactly what I wanted. Thanks so much!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! I'll get you the Butter Paneer Grilled Burger and small apple juice—just to confirm: Butter Paneer Grilled Burger and small apple juice? Perfect for a light meal! 😊

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's exactly what I wanted. Thanks so much!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! Your order is confirmed: Butter Paneer Grilled Burger and small apple juice. Enjoy your meal!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thanks for the quick help! Enjoy your meal!

query_texts: popular menu items burger chicken fries

documents: Our World Famous Fries®. The crisp, craveable, fan favourite: our World Famous Fries®. These epic fries are crispy and golden on the outside and fluffy on the inside.. Potato and salt. The legend among legends.

rag_trace.context_preview: - Our World Famous Fries® (~224.6–449.2 kcal, allergens: none listed)

documents: Butter Paneer Grilled Burger. Mildly spiced grilled paneer patty topped with makhani sauce and shredded onions placed between freshly toasted sesame seeded buns.. Mildly spiced grilled paneer patty, Shredded onion, Sesame seeded buns. Dil se makhani burger.

Chicken Maharaja Mac®. A double-decker toasted Maharaja bun sandwiched with one layer of flame-grilled chicken patty; crunchy iceberg lettuce; shredded onion; and a slice of cheese. Topped with another layer of flame-grilled
                                chicken patty; tomato slices; and crunchy iceberg lettuce infused with harberno sauce.. Maharaja bun crown, Haberno sauce, Shredded lettuce, Shredded onion, Jalapenos, Flame-grilled chicken patty, Sliced cheese, Maharaja bun heel. A royal treat.

McSpicy Paneer®. Crispy and spicy paneer patty with creamy tandoori sauce and crispy lettuce topping.. Quarter pounder bun crown, Shredded lettuce, Tandoori mayo, Spicy paneer patty, Quarter pounder bun heel. Let paneer surprise you.
